{{Quote|Bhoggihalysahonues' attempts to negotiate an end to these insane hostilities have ended in disaster! She, and all of her party—a thousand of our people—were murdered with energy-weapons almost the moment they appeared at the mouth of the ThonBoka and greeted the nearest vessel.|[[Senwannus'gourkahipaff]]|<ref name="lando" />}}
'''Bhoggihalysahonues''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Oswaft]] who served as one of three Elders of her massive, vacuum-breathing [[Species/Legends|species]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]]. In [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], Bhoggihalysahonues led a delegation of 1,000 Oswaft to negotiate with an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] that had arrived in the Oswaft's native [[ThonBoka]], despite significant opposition from other Elders who distrusted the Empire's intentions. Their concerns were proven right when the Imperial fleet opened fire on Bhoggihalysahonues and the other Oswaft as soon as they entered range—although Bhoggihalysahonues and her cohort destroyed the [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] ''[[Courteous]]'', it came at the cost of every single one of their lives.<ref name="lando" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]'' {{1stm}}
